description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in NES Game and NES System c108122 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the (1) phphtmllib parameter to (a) phphtmllib/includes.php; tag_utils/ scripts including (b) divtag_utils.php, (c) form_utils.php, (d) html_utils.php, and (e) localinc.php; and widgets/ scripts including (f) FooterNav.php, (g) HTMLPageClass.php, (h) InfoTable.php, (i) localinc.php, (j) NavTable.php, and (k) TextNav.php.
